name: ascii-render-pass
title: ASCII Render Pass
description: A slotted scene renders as live ASCII: a canvas samples the source's luminance grid (rasterized once at mount) and draws glyphs from a density ramp charset; resolution steps coarse to fine as the piece resolves, then holds legible-fine.
evidence: Wave M M1: Codrops 'Efecto: Building Real-Time ASCII and Dithering Effects with WebGL Shaders' (2026-01-04), the coded-motion ASCII wave from the wild scout

variables.label: Charset
variables.description: Density ramp, dark to light. A leading space keeps dark cells empty.

variables.label: Grid
variables.description: Final cell pitch the resolve lands on.

variables.label: Resolve at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start when the coarse-to-fine resolve begins.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Glyph ink: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the frame leaves. None holds the fine render.
